name: Over the Top Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
This traditional holiday cake gets its name because there is just about 1 cup of batter too much in this recipe and it you pour it all into your tube pan without using the collar, it will go over the top and all over your oven.
1. Beat eggs in a mixing bowl at medium speed.
2. Add remaining ingredients (sugar, brown sugar, oil, honey, coffee, flour, baking soda, baking powder, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, powdered cloves) one at a time while continuously beating.
3. Fold walnuts into the batter, reserving some to sprinkle on top.
4. Make a 2-inch collar around the outside of a lightly oiled and floured tube pan and its inside circle.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
6. Sprinkle remaining walnuts on top.
7. Bake at 335°F for 45-55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out dry.
8. Allow to cool before removing from pan. You can also bake this cake in loaf pans, reducing baking time accordingly. Enjoy!
